query: ALTER TABLE `digital_products` ADD `productType` enum('pdf','audiobook','video','other') DEFAULT 'pdf' NOT NULL; ALTER TABLE `digital_products` ADD `audioUrl` text; ALTER TABLE `digital_products` ADD `duration` varchar(32);
